title: Module Manifest
description: Validates module.yml files that declare a module's identity, type, dependencies, and exported capabilities.

name.description: Human-readable name of the module, used for display and referenced in public config module lists.

type.description: Module category. 'skin' provides UI theming, 'agent' wraps an agent, 'tool' adds CLI/MCP tools, 'integration' connects external services.

requires.description: List of module names or capabilities this module depends on.

items.description: A module name or capability identifier that must be present for this module to load.

provides.description: Declarations of what this module exports to the system.

capabilities.description: Capability identifiers this module makes available to the system.

agents.description: Agent IDs this module registers with the system.

items.description: An agent identifier matching an agent definition id.

entry.description: Relative path to the module's main entry file (e.g., 'index.ts', 'skin.css', 'agent.yml').
